text:
Thresholds & Classification
CPU Overload Levels
Level
None
Mild
Severe
Condition
idle ≥ 2 x threshold
threshold s idle < 2 x threshold
idle < threshold
Default
idle ≥ 20%
108 = idle < 208
idle < 10%
Connection Rate Levels
Based on conn_rate_core_multiplier × num_cores (default multiplier: 4.0):
Level
Formula
Example (8 cores)
None
rate ≤ 0.5 x multiplier x cores
≤ 16 conn/sec
Low
rate > 0.5 x multiplier x cores
> 16 conn/sec
Medium
rate > multiplier × cores
> 32 conn/sec
High
rate > 2 x multiplier x cores
> 64 conn/sec
Deciston Rules
DECREASE rate limit when:
CPU Overload = Severe (idle < 10%)
AND
Connection Rate * None (any elevated rate)
INCREASE rate limit when:
Rate limiting detected (connections rejected or queued)
AND
CPU Overload = None (idle ≥ 208)
Note: Changes only happen after stabilization_interval_secs (default: 5s) since last change.
